_readme: Michael's manual data inputs for the H2H model. Optional. Only fill what you have; the model treats anything missing as 'no data' and never fabricates. Player keys are the numeric api-tennis ids (same as p1Key/p2Key in matches.json, e.g. Kopriva = 1083). Match ids are the matches.json entry ids (e.g. 'upcoming-12147451').

_example_upcoming-12147451.note: MODERATOR INPUT (layer 2 'Subjective input'). Delete the leading underscore in the key to activate. signal is -1..+1 from the LEFT player's (p1's) point of view: +0.5 leans strongly to the left player, -0.5 to the right player, 0 = neutral. Contributes up to +/-10 probability points (maxMagnitude 0.10).

_example_1083.note: MODERATOR INPUT (layer 8 'Winner / unforced-error ratio'). Delete the leading underscore in the key to activate. Adjustment 8 uses winners/unforced as a ratio (>1 = aggressive & clean).
